overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from a survival horror game showing exploration of a dimly lit abandoned building. The player navigates through debris-filled rooms and interacts with armed NPC guards wearing gas masks at a checkpoint.

scene_state.functional_zone: abandoned back room with coat racks and debris

agents.ego_description: cautiously moving through the dark room illuminating corners with a flashlight

entered.detail: large wooden desk with papers and debris on surface
metal coat rack with hanging garments and bags
old white radiator mounted on the wall
stacked wooden crates and boxes in the corner
scattered papers and rubble covering the concrete floor

segments.scene_description: The player explores a dimly lit abandoned room with a flashlight, revealing wooden furniture, coat racks, radiators, and scattered debris on the concrete floor.

events.description: exiting the back room and approaching the main checkpoint doorway where armed guards become visible

agents.ego_description: approaching the doorway where two armed guards stand watch

notable_agents.action: two armed guards standing guard at the doorway entrance

long wooden counter running along the right wall

segments.scene_description: Moving from the back room toward a doorway, the player reveals a checkpoint area with two armed guards standing watch in the dimly lit corridor beyond.

events.description: initiating dialogue interaction with the first guard wearing a gas mask with red lenses

agents.ego_description: approaching and engaging in conversation with the first guard

notable_agents.action: guard wearing gas mask with red lenses and tactical gear standing at post

segments.scene_description: The player approaches the first guard for a close interaction, triggering a dialogue prompt, while the guard stands ready in tactical gear with a distinctive gas mask.

scene_state.functional_zone: checkpoint interior with desk and seated figure

events.description: interacting with the second guard wearing a hooded jacket and different gas mask
looking past the guards into the adjacent room where a person sits at a desk

agents.ego_description: talking with the second guard then observing the room beyond where another person works at a desk

notable_agents.action: second guard in hooded jacket with gas mask leaning against wall
person sitting at a desk with a lamp in the background room

entered.detail: wooden desk with items on top in the background room
table with illuminated lamp providing warm light
long red carpet running down the center of the floor
wooden chairs arranged near the desk

segments.scene_description: After interacting with the second guard, the player looks past the checkpoint into a larger room where a person sits working at a desk illuminated by a lamp, with a red carpet runner leading deeper into the facility.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person perspective moving from the claustrophobic clutter of an abandoned room into a guarded facility checkpoint. It begins with a flashlight cutting through the gloom of a debris-strewn room filled with old wooden furniture and radiators. As the camera moves toward a doorway, the space opens into a dimly lit corridor where two armed guards in tactical gear and gas masks stand watch. The perspective then shifts into a close interaction with the first guard before turning toward the second, eventually looking past the checkpoint into a larger room. The scene finally expands to reveal a person working at a lamp-lit desk, with a red carpet runner leading deeper into the facility.
